name: Follow
description: A motion behavior that makes an object smoothly follow and track another target object in 3D space. The follower maintains a configurable distance from its target while optionally rotating to face it. Supports physics-enabled objects and special handling for DirectionalLight objects that automatically follow the camera. KEY FEATURES:
documentation:
## Follow
Make an object follow another object in the scene.

### Settings
- **Follow Target** - The object to follow
- **Distance** - Minimum distance to maintain from target
- **Speed** - Movement speed (0-100)
- **Rotate** - Face the target while following

### Tips
- Use **Start on Trigger** for conditional following
- Great for companion characters, floating cameras, or orbiting objects
- Combine with animations for a walking companion effect
author: stemstudio

startOnTrigger.name: Start on Trigger
startOnTrigger.description: When enabled, the object will not follow until activated by a trigger event.

followTargetUuid.name: Follow Target
followTargetUuid.description: The scene object that this object will follow and move toward.

distance.name: Distance
distance.description: The minimum distance to maintain from the target. The follower stops moving when within this range.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: How fast the object moves toward its target. Higher values result in quicker following.

rotate.name: Rotate
rotate.description: When enabled, the object rotates to face the target while following it.
